The following events took place in '''1500 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] begin to establish colonies around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. {{Circa}}<ref name="Strongholds">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref>

*[[Battle of Gap Nine]]<ref name="TEA" />
